title: 9 Herbal Teas For Cavities
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help combat cavities. These compounds can reduce the growth of bacteria that cause tooth decay, such as Streptococcus mutans, and also reduce inflammation and pain associated with cavities.
